title: merremia oligodonta
intro: Merremia oligodonta, also known as the moon vine or climbing moon vine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae, native to tropical Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Merremia oligodonta include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
